### Intro The prerequisite for this code mod is to migrate your usages to the new syntax, so overloads for hooks and `QueryClient` methods shouldn't be available anymore. ### Affected usages Please note, this code mod transforms usages only where the first argument is an object expression. The following usage should be transformed by the code mod: ```ts const { data } = useQuery({ queryKey: ['posts'], queryFn: queryFn, keepPreviousData: true, }) ``` But the following usage won't be transformed by the code mod, because the first argument an identifier: ```ts const hookArgument = { queryKey: ['posts'], queryFn: queryFn, keepPreviousData: true, } const { data } = useQuery(hookArgument) ``` ### Troubleshooting In case of any errors, feel free to reach us out via Discord or open an issue. If you open an issue, please provide a code snippet as well, because without a snippet we cannot find the bug in the code mod.
